ClassificationModels.Name: phi4-mini:3.8b
ClassificationModels.Description: Default classification model. Microsoft Phi-4 family, 3.8B params, fits ~4 GB VRAM. Strong instruction-following for category labeling in reextract_library. Western supply chain.

ClassificationModels.Name: llama3.2:3b
ClassificationModels.Description: Alternative classifier. Meta Llama 3.2 family, 3B params. Different instruction-following characteristics if Phi struggles on a specific corpus.

ReconModels.Name: phi4:14b
ReconModels.Description: Default recon model for the CLI fallback. Microsoft Phi-4, 14B params, ~12 GB VRAM. Broader reasoning than the classifier (language detection, casing conventions, canonical URLs).

EmbeddingModels.Name: nomic-embed-text-v1.5
EmbeddingModels.Description: Default English embedding. 768-dim, 8192 token context. Strong MTEB performance (62.28), competitive with OpenAI text-embedding-3-small. Uses task prefixes (search_document: / search_query:). Apache-2.0, US supply chain.

RerankerModels.Name: mxbai-rerank-base-v1
RerankerModels.Description: Default reranker. 184M-param DeBERTa-v2, ~46.9 NDCG@10 on BEIR subset. Batched ~150ms on CPU for 50 candidates. Apache-2.0, English-focused. Best quality/latency tradeoff in the registry.

RerankerModels.Name: mxbai-rerank-large-v1
RerankerModels.Description: Larger mxbai variant. 435M-param DeBERTa-v2, ~48.8 NDCG@10 (~+2 NDCG vs base). 642 MB quantized, ~300-500ms batched. Pick when search quality matters more than latency.
